steps.assistant_text: Radial-dial HUD constructor (parent from &D_807FE938+0x10C8 factory, six cardinal-angle children at o->0x44..0x58, dirty-flag/parent-link attach idiom, two finalizers). NOVEL lever combo: (1) 'char * volatile' locals for P and ap=P+0x10 — target reloads from sp at EVERY use and never touches s2 across 9 calls; volatile local = stack home + per-use reload, explains the whole spill pattern; (2) volatile int pad[4] between decls = the 0x2C..0x38 frame gap (locals top-down in decl order); (3) 'c = P = (char*)factory(...)' combined assignment emits volatile sw BEFORE move s0,v0 (split statements emit move-first); (4) attach(ap = P + 0x10, c) assignment-expr arg: computes/stores once + uses value directly call 1, reloads calls 2-6; (5) mixed beq/beql-dup delay pattern emits NATURALLY from six identical C blocks (pure as1).

metadata.verification: 151/151 reloc-aware word-exact (36 relocs) + make ROM byte-identical (promoted)
